svg.text: MOZA MHG Grip + AB6 Base - Button Reference (js1)
MHG grip 1-29 mounted on the AB6 base 49-62 · trigger / hats / rocker / wings reused per operator mode

Combat (default) · Msl: Missile · Mine: Mining · Salv: Salvage. One control = a different job per operator mode (set on the MTQ knob); AB6 wings 49-56 are targeting in combat, module/salvage banks in those modes.
